description_long: This house complex features multiple interconnected residential structures with a modern, minimalist design. The buildings are primarily composed of rectangular forms with flat and slightly sloped roofs, and a mix of white, gray, and brown exterior finishes. Several units have rooftop terraces, visible outdoor patios, and landscaped green areas with trees and shrubs. Large windows and glass doors are present, providing ample natural light and a sense of openness. The layout includes driveways, walkways, and a central courtyard, suggesting a small urban neighborhood or townhouse cluster. The overall appearance is clean, geometric, and functional, with a focus on communal and private outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, multi-unit house complex with flat roofs, large windows, rooftop terraces, and landscaped courtyards, featuring white, gray, and brown exteriors.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the front and side facades, highlighting the main entryways, driveways, and a central courtyard with trees.
description_view_1: View 1 reveals the rear and side of the complex, showcasing rooftop terraces, green lawns, and more private outdoor spaces.
description_view_2: View 2 provides a top-down angle, emphasizing the flat roofs, rooftop patios, and the spatial arrangement of the buildings.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the opposite side of the complex, with visible garage doors, entry paths, and additional landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryways feature simple doors, some with small overhangs or porches, and are accessed via paved walkways or driveways, with minimal decorative elements.
